title: A Long Time Ago (disambiguation)
content:
'''A Long Time Ago''' may refer to one of the following:

==Canon==
*"[[Opening crawl|A long time ago, in a galaxy far, far away...]]", a phrase which [[Huyang]] used as the opening of a fairy tale in [[Part Six: Far, Far Away]]

==Legends==
*"'''A long time ago, in a sector far, far away....'''," the beginning of [[Episode XXIV: Death on the Rim]] of the ''[[True Tales of the Ancient Republic]]'' [[Holodrama/Legends|holodrama]] series
*"'''[[A LONG TIME AGO...]]'''," an article published in the periodical ''[[Imperial Center Today]]''

==Real world==
*"'''A long time ago in a galaxy far, far away....," a part of the [[opening crawl]] in the [[Star Wars saga|''Star Wars'' saga]] and other ''[[Star Wars]]'' products
*'''''[[A Long Time Ago....]]''''', a regular feature in ''[[Star Wars Insider]]''
*"'''[[A Long Time Ago, In a Toy Aisle Not So Far Away....]]'''," an article in the [[Star Wars Insider 120|120th issue]] of ''[[Star Wars Insider]]''
*"'''[[A Long Time Ago in a Mixed-Up Galaxy Far, Far Away...]]'''," a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] story in the [[Star Wars Jedi Quest CommLink Premier Issue|''Star Wars Jedi Quest CommLink'' Premier Issue]]
*'''''[[Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago...]]''''', a comic book series
**'''''[[Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... 1]]'''''
**'''''[[Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... 2]]'''''
**'''''[[Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... 3]]'''''
**'''''[[Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... 4]]'''''
**'''''[[Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... 5]]'''''
**'''''[[Classic Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... 6]]'''''

**'''''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 1: Doomworld]]'''''

**'''''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 3: Resurrection of Evil]]'''''
**'''''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 4: Screams in the Void]]'''''
**'''''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 5: Fool's Bounty]]'''''
**'''''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 6: Wookiee World]]'''''
**'''''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 7: Far, Far Away]]'''''
**'''''[[Star Wars Omnibus: A Long Time Ago.... Volume 1]]'''''
**'''''[[Star Wars Omnibus: A Long Time Ago.... Volume 2]]'''''
